text:
こ、これで任務は完了、かな？
なんとかなったんだよね？

……ふぅ、よかったぁ。
正直な話、緊張で震えてる。
ようやくほっとした感じよ。

……しょうがないでしょ。
あたし、いつもゼノと一緒で
ゼノがなんとかしてくれてたから……

甘えすぎるのも良くないって
最近になって……ううん、きみを
見てて、思いはじめて、さ。

って、そうじゃない！
なんでそんなこと話してる、あたし！
いいから帰るわよ、ほら！

I guess... that should do it? We managed it
somehow, right?

Phew--thank goodness. Honestly, I was so
nervous I was shaking. Now I can finally
breathe a sigh of relief...

I mean, it's not surprising. I'm always tagging
along with Zeno and he basically makes
everything work out in the end, so...

Recently, I've been thinking that maybe I rely
on him too much... Well, actually? Watching
you is what made me start thinking that.

Oh! No, you didn't hear that! Why am I even
talking about that!? Whatever, let's
just head back!
